{"step_by_step_thinking": "Ulcerative colitis is a type of inflammatory bowel disease, which is not an autoimmune disorder. Grave's disease is an autoimmune disorder affecting the thyroid gland. Rheumatoid arthritis is an autoimmune disorder affecting the joints. SLE (Systemic Lupus Erythematosus) is also an autoimmune disorder.", "answer_choice": "A"}
